# Link Group

The link group component displays a collection of related links organized under an optional heading. It provides a simple, accessible way to present groups of navigation or reference links in a vertical list format.

## Interactive Preview

Use the controls panel below to experiment with the link group's properties in real-time.

<Canvas of={LinkGroupStories.linkGroup} />
<Controls of={LinkGroupStories.linkGroup} />

## Properties

### Optional Properties

{twigPropsTable(componentProps, 'optional')}

## Technical Specifications

- **Atomic Level**: Molecule
- **Template**: `yds-link-group.twig`
- **Styles**: `_yds-link-group.scss`

### Accessibility

- Uses semantic HTML with proper list structure
- All links are keyboard accessible with clear focus indicators
- Screen readers announce the group structure and link count
- Proper heading hierarchy maintained when heading is present

### Behavior

- Links are displayed in a vertical list
- Standard link styling with hover states
- Responsive design adapts to container width
- Works without JavaScript

## Usage Guidelines

### Best Practices

- Use link groups to organize related navigation items
- Keep the number of links manageable (typically 10 or fewer)
- Provide a clear, descriptive heading to give context to the link collection
- Ensure link text is descriptive and clearly indicates the destination
- Group links logically by topic, function, or content type

### Things to Avoid

- Don't use link groups for primary navigation (use navigation components instead)
- Avoid mixing unrelated links in a single group
- Don't use overly long link text that becomes difficult to scan
- Avoid creating too many small link groups on a single page

## Testing

For comprehensive visual regression testing with all link group variations and theme combinations, see the [Visreg page](?path=/story/molecules-link-group-visreg).

## Related Components

- **Link Grid**: Use for displaying links in a multi-column grid layout
- **Menu**: Consider for more complex navigation structures
- **Card Collection**: Alternative for presenting links with additional context and imagery
